title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, reset device, changes are not preset [TO BE VERIFIED]
scenario: Custom EQ unsaved changes persist after device reset instead of reverting to saved preset
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Modify one or more EQ band sliders (do not tap Save)
Press and hold the Power button on the device to reset it
Wait for the device to power back on and reconnect
Open Poly Studio Mobile app again
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: The EQ should revert to the previously saved preset, and the unsaved changes should be discarded.
